code:
import io
import string
import list

fn add_value(_ evens: List<Int>, _ odds: List<Int>, _ v: Int) -> List<Int>
  if v % 2 == 0
    list.push(evens, v)
  else
    evens
  end
end

fn add_odd(_ odds: List<Int>, _ v: Int) -> List<Int>
  if v % 2 == 0
    odds
  else
    list.push(odds, v)
  end
end

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut evens: List<Int> = []
mut odds: List<Int> = []
mut token = ""
mut i = 0
while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(input, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13 or b == 11 or b == 12
  if is_ws
    if not string.is_empty(token)
      match string.parse_int(token)
      when Some(v)
        evens = add_value(evens, odds, v)
        odds = add_odd(odds, v)
      when None
        ()
      end
      token = ""
    end
  else
    token = "#{token}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
  end
  i = i + 1
end
if not string.is_empty(token)
  match string.parse_int(token)
  when Some(v)
    evens = add_value(evens, odds, v)
    odds = add_odd(odds, v)
  when None
    ()
  end
end

mut evens_str = "evens="
mut first_e = true
for x in evens
  if first_e
    evens_str = "#{evens_str}#{x}"
    first_e = false
  else
    evens_str = "#{evens_str} #{x}"
  end
end
println(evens_str)

mut odds_str = "odds="
mut first_o = true
for y in odds
  if first_o
    odds_str = "#{odds_str}#{y}"
    first_o = false
  else
    odds_str = "#{odds_str} #{y}"
  end
end
println(odds_str)
